title: LLMO Details
description: Aggregated CDN log metrics for LLM Optimization (LLMO) tracking, including bot classification, HTTP request patterns, response codes, and request latencies.

xdm:host.title: Host
xdm:host.description: Requested host/domain; base join key for site correlation

xdm:url.title: URL
xdm:url.description: CDN path (excluding domain) - used to derive content taxonomy (e.g., /products/analytics)

xdm:botType.title: Bot Type
xdm:botType.description: Bot type dimension aligned 1-to-1 with LLMO classifications

xdm:userAgent.title: User Agent
xdm:userAgent.description: Full user agent string; pattern-matched for LLMO bot classification

xdm:cdnProvider.title: CDN Provider
xdm:cdnProvider.description: CDN service provider identifier for source lineage

xdm:status.title: HTTP Status
xdm:status.description: HTTP response status code; used to compute success/error ratios

xdm:xForwardedHost.title: X-Forwarded-Host
xdm:xForwardedHost.description: X-Forwarded-Host header value from CDN or proxy

xdm:timeToFirstByte.title: Time to First Byte
xdm:timeToFirstByte.description: Latency metric in milliseconds; feeds LLMO Performance Latency metrics

xdm:requests.title: Request Count
xdm:requests.description: Aggregated request count grouping identical signatures
